name: data-wrapper
description: Zero-dependency HTML-first reactivity engine built on native Web Components
author: Gilan Salehi <gilansalehi@gmail.com>

scripts.build: bun build ./src/lib/index.ts --outfile ./dist/data-wrapper.js --format esm --target browser && bun build ./src/lib/index.ts --outfile ./dist/data-wrapper.min.js --format iife --minify --target browser
scripts.report: bun run build && bun run site:sync && bun scripts/report.ts
scripts.review: bun typecheck && bun run build && bun test && bunx playwright test
scripts.site:sync: cp dist/data-wrapper.js site/dist/data-wrapper.js && cp dist/data-wrapper.min.js site/dist/data-wrapper.min.js
